name: Kitchen Cupboard Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken breasts in lemon juice, minced garlic, parsley, and pepper for about 20 minutes. Then cut into cubes and sauté quickly. Set aside.
2. Boil the rigatoni pasta until tender, then drain.
3. In a large casserole dish, combine the soup, sour cream, mayonnaise, thyme, and pepper. Stir until smooth.
4. Add the cooked chicken, mushrooms, green beans, and about 1/4 of the fried onions to the dish. Mix well.
5. Add the cooked pasta and stir thoroughly.
6. Sprinkle the cheese over the top and add the remaining fried onions. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes or until bubbling.
